titleStmt.title: SII 20.19: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 19. (B.K. No. 59 of 1937-38.) RŪGI, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone standing near the front wall of the Hanumān temple (front and right sides).

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 936, Ānanda, Phālguṇa, Amāvāsya, Sunday, Saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1015, February 20, Sunday, f.d.t. ·56. The Mīna saṁkrānti occurred on the following day.
The record gives a genealogical account of the Chālukya dynasty in the beginning commencing from Raṇarāga, son of Jayasiṁha I, and ending with Vasudhaikamalla Ayyaṇadēva.

It registers a gift of 60 mattars of land, three gardens, one oil-mill and three shops, by Mahāsāmanta Dēvaṇarasa described as the brother of the king, to god Nagarēśvara. Moṟaḍiya Chāmuṇḍayya, the Sēnabōva, wrote the record. It mentions Chandraśēkharāchārya of the Nagarēśvara temple and also certain other individuals.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
@ śrī
@ svasti samasta bhuvanāśra
ya śrīprathuvīvallabhamahārājā
dhirājaparamēśvaraparamabhaṭṭāra
kaṁ nayaśaḻki puravarēśvaraṁ satyā
śrayakula dīpavardhananenisida
jayasiṁghavallabhanandana raṇarāgadēvaṁ
vātāpipuravarēśvaranaśvayajñadīkṣitaṁ
polikēsivallabhaṁ kīrttivarmmar Eraḍene
ya satyāśrayaṁ maṁgaḷārṇnavaṁ Eḍava
ridēvaṁ Ādityavarmma . duddhamallaṁ . nira
vadyanenisida vijayādityaṁ kukkuṟi vi
kramāditya madaṅgatyeyara bhīma
parākramaneraḍeneya kīrttivarma . piriya
tailapa . Eraḍeneya vikramāditya . Anmaku
ndeya bhīmaṁ . Ayyaṇayya . Uttuṁgamallane
nisida vikramāditya . Ātana magaṁ nijabhuja
cakravartti nūrmmaḍitṟelanenisidāhavamallava
llabha . nātana maganiṟivabeḍeṁgaṁ sāhasama
llaṁ satyāśrayadēva . nātana tammaṁ bhuvanayka
mallanenisida dasavarmmadēva . nātana magaṁ tribhuva
namallanenisida vikramādityadēva . nātana ta
mmaṁ vasudhaikamallanenisidayyaṇadēva . nāta
na tammaṁSome space is left blank after

© svasti samadhigatapaṁcama
hāśabda mahāsāmantaṁ
tējamārttaṇḍaṁ karahāṭavajra
kavāṭa koṁkaṇabhayaṁkaraṁ dhaḷamu
ṭṭegaṇḍanaṇnanabaṁṭaṁ śrīmatvasu
thaikamalladēva pādapaṁkajabhra
maraṁ śrīmat dēvaṇarasar . saka
varṣa 936 neyānanda saṁva
tsarada phālguṇadamāvāsyeyā
dityavāraṁ saṁkrāntiyandu śrīma
nnagarēśvara dēvargge baḍagavoladūro
ḍeyara mānyaṁ gōvaṇavoladoḷage
dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi bharaṇada
kōloḷ sarvvanamaśyaṁ biṭṭa nela .
mattaru 60 tōṁṭaṁ mūṟu
ghāṇavondu Aṁgaḍi mūṟu .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nṛpā
ṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ
sarvvānētānbhāginaṟpārtthivēndrā bhūyō
bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraṁ .
bhahubhirvvasudhā dattaṁ rājabhissagarā
dibhiḥ yasya yasya yadā bhūmi ta
sya tasya tadā phalaṁ . svadattaṁ para
dattaṁ vā yō harētu vasuṁdharāṁ
ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimi . Akarasya karīkara
ṇaṁ gōsahaśravadhasmṛta prabhaṁga
karamudrēśyaṁ gōkōṭiphalamāpni
yāt . Aṇiviṇigeydī dharmmama
naṇiyaramaḷidoṁge peṟatu gati
yillā balkaṇi vāraṇāśiyoḷa su
vuṁ brāhmaṇaranaḷidanajiguji
giḷida .
erased
śrīmannagarēśvarada candraśēkharācāryya
ra cchātrargge Illiya vṛttikāṟar kuḷa
karaṇi sōvayyanuṁ Uttavayyanumilli
ya dātāraṁ dēyimayya seṭṭiyara
gaṁ muṭṭiṁ nallayyanuṁ maraḷayyanuṁ
rmmaṁcikādhimayya nintiSome
varellaṁ tiṟdi pēḷeSome space
sēnabōvaṁ moṟaḍiya cāvuṇḍamayyaṁ
sāsanamaṁ baredaṁ . kallakuṭiganajjama
Akkaramaṁ kaṇḍarisidaṁ maṁgaḷa mahā
śrī .
Digital edition of SII 20.19 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
